evidence_snippets: floor. We now see that Ravelli is a bald pitbull of a man with badly scarred skin that is painted white and red.
Otis, lantern in hand, leads the way. Followed by Baby and Mother together under a large black umbrella. Next Rufus holds the leash connected to Jerry, Denise and Mary.
